repair_history.diagnosis:
Couldn't resolve reference to 'impl'.: AGREE references component implementation properties using component type names, not implementation names. -> Replace 'Consumer.impl' with 'Consumer' in all references.
Couldn't resolve reference to 'sched_period'.: Property 'sched_period' is not accessible via component type 'Consumer'. -> Remove or replace 'sched_period' reference with valid property.
Couldn't resolve reference to 'deadline'.: Property 'deadline' is not accessible via component type 'Consumer'. -> Remove or replace 'deadline' reference with valid property.
Couldn't resolve reference to 'compute_time'.: Property 'compute_time' is not accessible via component type 'Consumer'. -> Remove or replace 'compute_time' reference with valid property.
Couldn't resolve reference to 'priority'.: Property 'priority' is not accessible via component type 'Consumer'. -> Remove or replace 'priority' reference with valid property.

Couldn't resolve reference to 'period'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Consumer.period' as a valid property expression in component type scope -> Replace 'Consumer.period' with 'period' (assuming 'period' is a valid property name in the component type)
Couldn't resolve reference to 'deadline'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Consumer.deadline' as a valid property expression in component type scope -> Replace 'Consumer.deadline' with 'deadline' (assuming 'deadline' is a valid property name in the component type)
Couldn't resolve reference to 'compute_time'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Consumer.compute_time' as a valid property expression in component type scope -> Replace 'Consumer.compute_time' with 'compute_time' (assuming 'compute_time' is a valid property name in the component type)
Couldn't resolve reference to 'priority'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Consumer.priority' as a valid property expression in component type scope -> Replace 'Consumer.priority' with 'priority' (assuming 'priority' is a valid property name in the component type)
Couldn't resolve reference to 'dispatch_protocol'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Consumer.dispatch_protocol' as a valid property expression in component type scope -> Replace 'Consumer.dispatch_protocol' with 'dispatch_protocol' (assuming 'dispatch_protocol' is a valid property name in the component type)

Couldn't resolve reference to 'period'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'period' as a valid identifier in the current scope -> Replace 'period' with 'Period' (matching the AADL property name)
Couldn't resolve reference to 'deadline'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'deadline' as a valid identifier in the current scope -> Replace 'deadline' with 'Deadline' (matching the AADL property name)
Couldn't resolve reference to 'compute_time'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'compute_time' as a valid identifier in the current scope -> Replace 'compute_time' with 'Compute_Execution_Time' (matching the AADL property name)
Couldn't resolve reference to 'priority'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'priority' as a valid identifier in the current scope -> Replace 'priority' with 'Priority' (matching the AADL property name)
Couldn't resolve reference to 'dispatch_protocol'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'dispatch_protocol' as a valid identifier in the current scope -> Replace 'dispatch_protocol' with 'Dispatch_Protocol' (matching the AADL property name)

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE annex is in component type scope but references implementation properties -> Move the AGREE annex to the component implementation scope
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Deadline'.: AGREE annex is in component type scope but references implementation properties -> Move the AGREE annex to the component implementation scope
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_Time'.: AGREE annex is in component type scope but references implementation properties -> Move the AGREE annex to the component implementation scope
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: AGREE annex is in component type scope but references implementation properties -> Move the AGREE annex to the component implementation scope
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE annex is in component type scope but references implementation properties -> Move the AGREE annex to the component implementation scope

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 86: Assume statements are allowed only in component types: AGREE assume/guarantee statements are not permitted in thread implementations; they must be in component types. -> Move the entire annex agree block from Consumer.impl to Consumer
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 86: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: Period, Deadline, Compute_Execution_Time, Priority, and Dispatch_Protocol are AADL properties of the implementation, not visible as expressions in AGREE unless referenced from the component type. -> Move the annex agree block to Consumer, where AADL properties are accessible as AGREE expressions
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 90: no viable alternative at input '"periodic"': AGREE cannot compare a property to a string literal; Dispatch_Protocol is an AADL enumeration, but AGREE requires enum values to be referenced via valid type context. -> Remove the guarantee clause for Dispatch_Protocol since AGREE cannot express AADL enumeration literals without type context, and no visible enum type is defined
